name: io.github.intelli-verse-x/router-mcp
description: Run the Intelliverse platform from any agent: create App IDs, mint tier API keys, ingest/search per-app knowledge bases, send email, generate media, check credits, chat — 15 tools, no model names ever.

environmentVariables.name: ROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Tier API key (chat, KB, media, email, credits)

environmentVariables.name: ROUTER_WORKSPACE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default workspace UUID for admin tools
